summary: Plan-only classification: #84569 remains the live canonical WhatsApp session-stall/no-reply issue. #84578 is the focused related PR for final WhatsApp error-payload delivery, but it is not merge-ready because multiple checks are failing and merge/fix actions are blocked by the job. #91998 and the linked pendingFinalDelivery/recovery reports stay related rather than duplicates because they carry distinct triggers or root-cause scope.
